title: Captain 'Notify Selected Players' button
description: Add a button to the captain's fixture/team selection screen that sends push notifications to all players who have been selected for that fixture. The notification tells each player they've been picked, with details of the fixture (opponent, date, venue). Only players with push notifications enabled receive the notification.
acceptance_criteria: A 'Notify Players' button appears on the fixture detail/team selection page after players have been assigned
Clicking the button sends a push notification to each selected player who has an active push subscription
Notification body includes: team name, opponent, date, and venue
Notification click opens the player's availability/fixture page
Players without push subscriptions are silently skipped (no error)
Button shows success feedback: 'Notified X of Y players' (where Y is total selected, X is those with push enabled)
Button is only visible to captains/admins
Expired/invalid subscriptions are cleaned up on send failure (410 Gone)
HTMX-powered: button posts to endpoint and swaps in the result message

backend_logic: Get all fixture_players for the fixture
For each player, look up their fantasy token
Use webpush.SendToPlayer(token, title, body, data) for each
Collect results: how many notified vs skipped
Return HTMX partial with result summary

notification_payload.title: You've been selected!
notification_payload.body: You're playing for {team} vs {opponent} on {date} at {venue}

existing_infrastructure: Fixture detail page already exists in admin
fixture_players table links players to fixtures

testing_requirements: Test notification sent to player with active subscription
Test player without subscription is skipped gracefully
Test notification content includes correct fixture details
Test button only visible to captains/admins
Test feedback message shows correct counts
Test notification click opens correct URL on player's device
Test expired subscription cleanup on 410 response

context.user_story: As a captain, I want to press a button to notify all selected players so they know immediately that they've been picked for a match
context.related_pages: Admin fixture detail page where team selection happens
